title: Easy Swordfish Coloring Page
seoTitle: Easy Swordfish Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Color a simple swordfish leaping in the sea. Ideal for young children. Free high-res printable PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: The swordfish has specialized heating organs next to its eyes, keeping its brain warm and vision sharp in deep, cold waters.
swordfishs use their long, flat bills (swords) to slash and stun prey in schools of fish, rather than spearing them.
